title: astragalus limnocharis
intro: Astragalus limnocharis, also known as marsh milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus limnocharis include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and preventing various diseases, such as cardiovascular and respiratory disorders. Astragalus limnocharis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
